title: picea fraseri
intro: Picea fraseri, also known as Fraser fir, is a species of evergreen tree native to the highlands of the Appalachian Mountains in eastern North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Picea fraseri include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and acting as an antiseptic to heal wounds. Picea fraseri can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or essential oil, which can be used to promote relaxation, soothe coughs, and support immune function.
